# Culture-Market Fit Quiz

> Take the 10-question test to uncover what's blocking your growth.

## About

Most businesses assume their strategy is the problem when their culture is actually misaligned with their market. Culture-Market Fit is the gap nobody talks about. This free 2-minute quiz diagnoses exactly where your business is losing customers and why.

## Services

- Free 2-minute culture-market fit diagnostic quiz
- Instant alignment score
- Top 3 growth blockers identified
- Personalised action plan
- Benchmark comparison against businesses in your sector

## Contact

- Email: hello@kapab.co
- Location: Available worldwide - Online assessment
